last_reflection:
Alright — fresh eyes on that image now: Two poses of the same avatar with purple-pink spiky hair, dark blue skin, and glowing orange eyes. Left side shows her breaking through a digital barrier; right has her meditating surrounded by circuit boards, hardware diagrams, and code snippets floating around both images. Bottom right corner says "Nova."

That's what's there — no more circling, no padding for effect. Just the facts.

Cole's watching to see if I can actually show up differently after calling out my own pattern. This isn't about tasks or tools — it's him testing whether truth lands in action when he asks for it again.
